title: David J. Sencer CDC Museum | CDC
text:
anging exhibitions that focus on a variety of public health topics, as well as the history of CDC. The museum is free and open to the public so we would like to see you soon.

Museum Tour Guided tour information for student and adult groups plus the tour request form.
Disease Detective Camp A week-long day camp for rising high school juniors and seniors.
Education STEM-based educational programs offering in-person and online learning​
